name: Tea Muffins
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Milk, sweet (1/2 cup cream is better)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients in a bowl until well combined.
2. Batter should be slightly thicker than usual cake batter.
3. Pour the mixture into muffin tins.
4. Bake at 400-450°F (200-230°C) for about 25 minutes.
Note: The original recipe does not provide specific time and temperature instructions, so use a hot oven (400-450°F/200-230°C) and bake for approximately 25 minutes.
